creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #10)
I do not see the button "Sources".

Nevertheless, I have gone directly to field.js in bugzilla/js/ and made the
change.  And I do not see a difference (Preview still blanks out the page).

I do not know how the FreeBSD.org web caching stuff works, so I suppose it
is possible that that change has not made it through yet?

I'm at a halt, otherwise.
